## Goal

## Layer

- API
- Core
- Engine
- Domain
- Infrastructure
- Flutter
- Documentation

## Scope

List what should be included.

## Out of scope

List what should not be included.

## Required reading

- [ ] Criterion 3

State any permission, module, feature, or plan impact.
